title: leymus divaricatus
intro: Leymus divaricatus, also known as bearded wheat grass or bearded grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Leymus divaricatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Leymus divaricatus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
